name: Chocolate Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter/margarine in a medium saucepan and remove from heat.
2. Stir in the cocoa powder.
3. Stir in the brown sugar, then beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
4. Blend in the flour, chopped walnuts, and salt.
5. Spread evenly in a greased 8-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Cool and frost. Makes about 16 brownies.
